name: Vinyl Reality - DJ in VR
short_description: Vinyl Reality is the most realistic and authentic simulation of DJing with vinyl in VR. Load and mix your own tracks with two fully-functional turntables and a DJ mixer. Easily record or stream sets from awesome audio reactive stages. Personalize your experience with custom environments and avatars.
detailed_description:
Master the art of DJing in VR!

Created by experienced DJs and VR developers, Vinyl Reality combines our passion for music and cutting-edge technology to deliver the most realistic and authentic simulation of DJing with vinyl in VR!

Easily load and play your own music on a complete, fully-functional vinyl DJ setup. Use accurate and intuitive controls to effortlessly cue records, make precise pitch adjustments, perform fast fader cuts, and shape the sound with EQ and filters.

Choose from a variety of environments and experience the thrill of playing for a massive rave crowd, or practice in a more relaxed, distraction-free setting. Record your mixes directly to audio with the press of a button, or stream your performances live using multiple adjustable camera angles.

Personalize your experience with a growing library of community-created content. Download free environments, change your avatar or customize the built-in stages with your own VJ visuals.

Unparalleled Realism

Every knob, button, and fader on the turntables and mixer was meticulously recreated to look, feel, and move just like the real thing.

Whether you’re new to DJing or already a pro, this faithful recreation ensures your skills are easily transferable between VR and real-world setups.

DJ Gear Features

  • Two fully functional turntables based on the iconic SL-1200 series

  • Fully-featured 2-channel DJ mixer with per channel EQ, Filters, PFL and gain

  • Support for all common audio file formats: mp3, flac, wav, ogg, aif, wma and m3u playlists

  • Rekordbox integration to seamlessly import your tracks and playlists from Rekordbox

  • Unique virtual headphones system to easily monitor cued tracks

  • Separate master audio output and high-quality (32-bit wave) audio recorder

  • Record case to easily browse and load your personal music collection

  • Vinyl records with cover art and grooves that match track structure

  • Ergonomic DJ table with adjustable height and angle

Additional Features

  • Short interactive tutorial to learn the basic controls

  • Three included environments to chose from with audio reactive crowds, lights and effects

  • Support for loading user generated custom environments (freely available from mod.io)

  • SDK to create custom environments using the Unity Editor

  • Several avatar presets to chose from

  • Four different spectator camera angles with audio reactive auto-switch function
